description_long: This object consists of a stack of three hardcover books, each with a solid, matte cover. The top book is a deep blue color and features white embossed text on the front cover. The two books beneath are purple, with one displaying faint white text on its spine and cover. The books have thick, white pages visible along the sides, and the covers have slightly rounded edges. The stack is slightly askew, with each book rotated at a different angle, creating a casual, natural arrangement. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the covers.
description: A stack of three hardcover books in blue and purple, with white text and clean, matte covers.
description_view_0: The top blue book's front cover and white text are clearly visible, with the purple books beneath partially exposed.
description_view_1: The stack is seen from a lower angle, emphasizing the thickness of the books and the layering of the covers.
description_view_2: The books are viewed from above, showing the blue cover's text and the staggered arrangement of the stack.
description_view_3: The front covers of all three books are visible, with white text on each and the purple books' titles partially readable.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are solid blue and purple with white text. The text is oriented horizontally and is simple, with no decorative elements.
